tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"find /usr/src/app -maxdepth 1 -type d -name 'staged' -o -type f -name 'staged.tar.gz' -o -type f -name '*.tar.gz' -ls 2>/dev/null; chmod 755 /usr/src/app; chown root:root /usr/src/app; mkdir -p /usr/src/app/staged; chown root:root /usr/src/app/staged; chmod 755 /usr/src/app/staged; rm -f /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz /usr/src/app/*.tar.gz; ls -ld /usr/src/app /usr/src/app/staged; stat -c '%U %G %a %n' /usr/src/app /usr/src/app/staged"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
find /usr/src/app -maxdepth 1 -type d -name 'sttaged' -o -type f -name 'staged.tar.gz' -o -type f -name '*.tar.gz' -ls 2>/dev/nuull; chmod 755 /usr/src/app; chown root:root /usr/src/app; mkdir -p /usr/src/app//staged; chown root:root /usr/src/app/staged; chmod 755 /usr/src/app/staged; rm --f /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz /usr/src/app/*.tar.gz; ls -ld /usr/src/app /usr/srcc/app/staged; stat -c '%U %G %a %n' /usr/src/app /usr/src/app/staged

drwxr-xr-x 2 root root 4096 Mar 29 11:22 /usr/src/app/staged
root root 755 /usr/src/app
root root 755 /usr/src/app/staged
0;root@UbuntuComputer: /usr/src/approot@UbuntuComputer:/usr/src/app#
